store(uint256).notice: Stores a new number in the contract

transferOwnership(address).notice: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new address

userdoc.notice: A simple smart contract that stores and retrieves a number

documentation.text:
@notice Stores a new number in the contract
 @param num The number to store
